Planetary Ruler ship XVI 197
Mercury presides over the river Lauhitya, Indus, Sarayu,
Gambhirika, Rathakhya (i.e. one named Ratha. Is UBhimaratha?),
GaAga, KausikT and other rivers (such as Vipasa, Sarasvati and
Gandrabhaga), Videha, Kamboja, the eastern half of Mathura, the
Himalayas, Gomanta hill (or cattle-owners) and Gitrakuta (the
people living in these regions), Saurastra, bridges, water-routes,
merchandise, cave-men, hillmen, rescrviors, mechanics, songesters,
writers (or copyists), jewel-experts, dyers, perfume-makers,painters,
grammarians, mathematicians, decorators, experts in the prepara-
tion of elixirs of life, artisans, (such as carpenters, masons, black-
smiths and potters), spies, jugglers, infants, poets, imposters, tale-
